name: content-page
description: Build a structured, SEO-ready content page from a topic.

steps.instruction:
Research {topic}. Capture the questions real readers ask and the facts
needed to answer them.
steps.title: Research

steps.instruction:
Plan the page: an H1, a short intro, and H2 sections that answer each of
the reader's questions in order of importance.
steps.title: Structure

steps.instruction:
Write the page from the outline. Answer the top question in the first
screen. Write for a real reader, not a search engine.
steps.title: Write

steps.instruction: Check the HTML is well-formed and the structure is intact.
steps.title: Validate

steps.instruction: Finalize SEO: title tag, meta description, and natural use of {keyword}.
steps.title: Seo
